prompt_improvements.suggestion: Require workflow_dispatch inputs to be passed through step env (not direct script interpolation), with explicit character validation and multiline-safe writes to GITHUB_ENV.
Require bounded retry/backoff for post-deployment checks and explicit classification of retryable vs non-retryable Azure CLI errors.
Require deployment targets (resource group, function app) to come from environment-scoped variables instead of free-form manual inputs.
Require third-party workflow actions to be pinned to immutable commit SHAs.
Require timeout-minutes on deployment jobs to avoid hung runs.
